CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DUDUM, ALICE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT ALICE DUDUM'S DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $310, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Responses And Production Of Documents And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.

DEFENDANT ALICE DUDUM's Defendant's Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Responses And Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $310, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Assigned To Arbitration On Aug-09-10; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Sep-21-10 At 10:00 A.M.
